project_type: Python Telegram Bot for Railway deployment
build_system: pip with requirements.txt, Railway deployment via Procfile
test_framework: Manual testing / smoke test via python import
verification_instructions: 1. Install dependencies with pip install -r requirements.txt. 2. Verify python can import the bot module without errors. 3. Verify all required files exist (bot.py, requirements.txt, Procfile, said_yes_template.html).
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET - full network access. Python 3.11 available. No Telegram token available for live testing - validation is structural/import-based.
contribution_requirements: No formal contribution guidelines. Repo has a single HTML file. Bot is greenfield development.
key_patterns: Existing HTML file uses base64-encoded GIFs, has a 'Nai' placeholder in .name-tag element, Yes button triggers fetch to a callback URL, No button dodges on hover/touch/click.
directory_structure: Root contains only 'do_you_love_me_Crush name.html' - a love confession card with bear GIFs, dodging No button, and success animation. The bot will be built around this template.
